creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
Were you able to do any of the above?  A dump from a recent version where I have added the nvm prints would be helpful to me.

I would like to make some progress or close this out.  I don't doubt you've seen an issue but the i350 is one of the most popular igb cards for FreeBSD and we don't see other reports like this so it will be hard to move forward without some help.
